1.text: Claim No: ENF 018/2009 THE JUDICIAL AUTHORITY OF THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL

4.text: ORDER Upon receiving the Determination of the Director of Employment Standards against Yusr Islamic Investment Bank Limited dated 11 August 2009 (the "Determination") which was submitted in accordance with the statutory authority given to the Director under Article 81 of the DIFC Employment Law, DIFC Law No. 4 of 2005 and in accordance with the Rules of the DIFC Courts Part 45.16 and

6.text: 1. The Defendant shall pay to Amgad Younes the amount of AED 93,750 together with statutory interest which shall be assessed for any amount not payable in 7 days of the date of the Determination.

7.text: 2. The amount should be paid to Amgad Younes by no later than thirty-one (31) days after the receipt of the Determination by the Defendant.

8.text: 3. Leave to appeal the Determination is granted for a period of thirty (30) days following receipt of the Determination.

9.text: Mark Beer Registrar Date of Issue: 12 August 2009 at 3:30pm
